name: Chinese Beef Stir-Fry with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sirloin tips; cut into 1-inch cubes
2 large Broccoli stalks; stems removed and cut into florets
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the sirloin at room temperature in a mixture of sherry, soy sauce, half the cornstarch, sugar, 1/2 teaspoon of oil, pepper, and garlic for one hour.
2. Heat a tablespoon of the remaining oil in a wok over high heat.
3. Stir-fry beef quickly until the meat is medium rare. Remove and set aside.
4. Mix the remaining cornstarch with oyster sauce.
5. Reheat the wok with the remaining oil. Add broccoli and carrots; stir-fry for 30 seconds.
6. Add broth, cover the wok, and steam for approximately one minute or until the vegetables are tender-crisp.
7. Add corn, snow peas, scallion, beef, and oyster-cornstarch mixture. Heat quickly until the sauce is clear and thickened.
8. Serve immediately.
